generic_name: Yogurt intero - 125g x 2 - Gusto frutti di bosco
generic_name_en: Whole milk yoghurt - 125g x 2 - Wild berries
generic_name_it: Yogurt intero - 125g x 2 - Gusto frutti di bosco

ingredients.text: succo di ribes neri da concentrato

ingredients_text: yogurt intero 85% (latte intero pastorizzato, fermenti lattici vivi), preparato ai frutti di bosco 15% (zucchero, frutti di bosco 8% sul totale (mirtilli neri, more, succo di ribes neri da concentrato, succo di sambuco da concentrato, succo di lamponi da concentrato, fragole), amido modificato di mais, aroma). Senza glutine.
ingredients_text_de: Joghurt 85%, Waldfruchtzubereitung 15% (Zucker, Waldfrüchte 8% (Heidelbeeren, Brombeeren, Schwarzer Johannisbeersaftkonzentrat, Holundersaftkonzentrat, Himbeersaftkonzentrat, Erdbeeren), modifizierte Maisstärke, Aromen). Glutenfrei
ingredients_text_de_ocr_1575140143:
_Joghurt_ 85%, Waldfruchtzubereitung 15% (Waldfrüchte 8%(Heidelbeeren, Brombeeren, Schwarzer Johannisbeer- saftkonzentrat, Holundersaftkonzent- rat, Himbeersaftkonzentrat, Erdbeeren), Zucker, Glukose-Fruktosesirup, modifi zierte Maisstärke, Aromen). 
Glutenfrei.

Glutenfrei.
ingredients_text_en: yogurt 85%, wild berries preparation 15% (sugar, wild berries 8%, (blueberries, blackberries, black currant juice concentrate, elderberry juice concentrate, raspberry juice concentrate, strawberries), modified corn starch, flavours). Gluten-free
ingredients_text_fr: _Yaourt_ 85%, préparation de fruits rouges 15% (fruits rouges 8% (myrtille, mûre, jus concentré de cassis, jus concentré de baie de sureau, jus concentré de framboise, fraise), sucre, sirop de glucose-fructose, amidon modifié de mais, arômes)
